scenes.text:
THE HOLLOW GATE

The King does not look up when you enter. His crown is upside-down on the table.
The spymaster was found dead that morning — no wounds, no marks, a scream frozen on his face.

"Elara was taken last night from her chambers. No body. No ransom. The royal wizard says he felt a door open... somewhere else."

He slides three things across the table:

  1. A signet ring — opens any door in the kingdom
  2. A pouch of gold
  3. A sealed letter from the spymaster

"One condition": find her. Come back without her, and he won't need to execute you.

choices.text: Take the signet ring and ride for the Wastes
Take the gold and visit the city underworld
Ask the wizard about the sealed letter
Seek the castle captain for men

scenes.text:
THE WASTES GATE

The city wall ends. Beyond it, the Wastes — grey hills and old bones. A storm is rolling in.
A merchant caravan is huddled by the gate, too afraid to move. A lone rider watches you from a rock.
You have the signet ring.

choices.text: Show the ring, demand passage and horses
Sneak past when the storm hits
Join the caravan and wait for morning
